response.justification: While the candidate exceeds the 15-year experience requirement with strong full-stack engineering credentials and entrepreneurial experience, this is a specialized role requiring demonstrated AI/ML expertise and strategic leadership. The resume shows only recent exposure to AI infrastructure (1 month at re:cinq) with no evidence of building AI products, leading strategic AI initiatives, or advising on AI adoption—gaps that are critical for a Principal Engineer focused on AI Strategy. The lack of advanced degree in AI-related fields and absence of recognized AI platform expertise disqualify the candidate despite solid foundational engineering skills.
strengths: Exceeds 15-year requirement with ~20 years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded systems, and infrastructure
Proven entrepreneurial capability as founder of GISCollective open-source platform with real-world users, demonstrating ability to build products independently
Strong full-stack technical foundation with cloud (AWS CDK, Kubernetes, Docker) and infrastructure expertise (DevOps, CI/CD), providing platform development fluency
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI/ML despite it being a preferred qualification for a specialized AI strategy role
Lacks demonstrated AI/ML expertise with no shipped products or platforms built with AI—current AI infrastructure work is brand new (1 month tenure at re:cinq) with no proven track record

No evidence of strategic leadership, customer advisory experience, or director-level impact required for principal engineer role; background shows individual contributor roles rather than strategic partnership and influence

key_factors.factor: Absence of recognized AI/ML expertise and demonstrated products
Insufficient strategic and leadership experience for director-level role
Exceeds minimum years of experience with entrepreneurial background
